settings.guideBody:
1️⃣  Scan ingredients
Snap a photo of the ingredients in your fridge or shopping basket.

2️⃣  Generate AI recipes
Claude AI recognizes your ingredients and recommends 3 tailored recipes.

3️⃣  Check nutrition info
View the calories, protein, carbs, and fat for each recipe.

4️⃣  Save recipes
Save the recipes you like with the ♥ button.

5️⃣  Ask the quokka
Ask the quokka anything — ingredient swaps, calorie adjustments, and more.

6️⃣  Buy missing ingredients
Order any ingredients you don't have at home right from Coupang.
settings.updateBody:
🎉  v1.0.0 — First Release

• AI ingredient recognition
• 3 tailored recipe recommendations
• Nutrition info (calories · protein · carbs · fat)
• Recipe saving & bookmarks
• Ask the quokka
• Coupang integration for missing ingredients
• YouTube recipe video search
• Dietary preference settings (allergies · spice level · diet, etc.)
settings.termsBody:
Quokka Recipe Terms of Service

By installing, downloading, or using this app, you are deemed to have agreed to these Terms and the Privacy Policy.

Article 1 (Purpose)
These Terms aim to define the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between the Company and users in relation to the use of the Quokka Recipe app and related services (hereinafter the "Service") provided by Chasoft (hereinafter the "Company").

Article 2 (Definitions)
1. "Service" means the AI-powered recipe recommendations and related supplementary features.
2. "User" means a person who uses the Service in accordance with these Terms.
3. "Leaves" means the in-service currency used to invoke AI features, divided into free leaves and paid (purchased/bonus) leaves.
4. "Quokka Pass" means a paid subscription product that automatically renews on a monthly basis.

Article 3 (Effect and Amendment of Terms)
1. These Terms take effect upon being posted on the Service screen.
2. The Company may amend these Terms within the scope that does not violate applicable laws, and will give notice from 7 days before the effective date (30 days before for changes unfavorable to users).
3. If a user continues to use the Service after the amended Terms take effect, the user is deemed to have agreed to the amendment.

Article 4 (Provision and Change of the Service)
1. The Company provides the following services.
· AI-based recipe recommendations (ingredient photo recognition, manual ingredient entry, dish name search)
· Ingredient registration via receipt recognition
· Fridge ingredient management
· Recipe saving · folders · notes · questions (Q&A)
· YouTube recipe video search
2. The Company provides the Service year-round in principle, but it may be temporarily suspended due to reasons such as system maintenance or external API failures.
3. The Company may change or discontinue the content of the Service as operationally or technically necessary, and will give advance notice when there is a material impact on paid services.

Article 5 (Paid Services and Payment)
1. Paid services consist of "Leaf Recharge Packages" (one-time) and the "Quokka Pass" (subscription).
2. All payments are made through the payment system of Google Play or the Apple App Store, and the payment amount, currency, and taxes follow what is displayed in each store.
3. Paid leaves are credited immediately upon completion of payment, and purchased/bonus leaves are retained with no separate expiration date (except upon termination of the Service).

Article 6 (Subscription and Cancellation)
1. The Quokka Pass automatically renews and is charged each billing cycle after payment.
2. Users may cancel at any time from the subscription management screen of each store up to at least 24 hours before the next billing date.
3. Upon cancellation, the Service is maintained until the end of the already-paid usage period, after which automatic renewal stops.
4. Deleting the app does not automatically cancel the subscription; cancellation must be carried out from the subscription management screen of each store.

Article 7 (Withdrawal of Subscription and Refunds)
1. Refunds, in principle, follow the refund policy and procedures of Google Play or the Apple App Store where the payment was made.
2. In accordance with the "Act on the Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce, etc.," unused paid leaves and the like may be withdrawn within 7 days from the date of payment.
3. However, withdrawal may be restricted for digital content that has already been used or immediately consumed such that its value has expired, and for portions for which provision has already begun; the Company notifies users of this prior to purchase.
4. If a minor makes a payment without the consent of a legal representative, the minor or the legal representative may cancel that payment.

Article 8 (Use of Leaves)
1. Free leaves are reset to a set amount every midnight and do not carry over to the next day.
2. Paid/bonus leaves are not refundable in cash (except in accordance with refund procedures) and cannot be transferred to others.

Article 9 (Data Storage and Loss)
1. The Service does not provide a separate member account or server backup feature, and user data (saved recipes · folders · notes, fridge ingredients, settings, leaf balance, etc.) is stored only on the user's device.
2. Stored data may be deleted or lost and may be unrecoverable due to reasons such as device change, app deletion, operating system change, or device malfunction.
3. The Company is not liable for data loss arising from the above reasons unless there is intent or gross negligence. Users are advised to keep any necessary information separately.

Article 10 (Advertising)
1. The Company may serve advertisements to free users.
2. When a user watches a rewarded ad, leaves are granted, and limits on daily count and viewing interval apply to prevent abuse.
3. No advertisements are shown to Quokka Pass users.

Article 11 (User Obligations)
Users must not engage in the following acts.
1. Acquiring ad rewards or leaves through abnormal means
2. Reverse-engineering the Service or accessing it improperly
3. Reproducing or distributing Service content without authorization
4. Violating applicable laws or these Terms

Article 12 (Disclaimer)
1. The recipes and information provided by the Service are reference information generated by generative AI, and the Company does not guarantee their accuracy, completeness, timeliness, or suitability.
2. Before cooking, users must personally verify the freshness of ingredients, expiration dates, potential allergens, and cooking safety.
3. The Company is not liable for cooking results and food safety issues arising during use of the Service unless there is intent or gross negligence.
4. The Company is not liable for damages caused by reasons beyond its reasonable control, such as natural disasters or external API/platform failures.

Article 13 (Intellectual Property Rights)
Intellectual property rights, including copyrights, in the Service and related content belong to the Company.

Article 14 (Restriction of Use and Termination)
If a user violates these Terms, the Company may restrict use of the Service or terminate the agreement after prior notice (or subsequent notice in urgent cases).

Article 15 (Dispute Resolution and Governing Law)
1. These Terms are interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Korea.
2. Disputes related to use of the Service follow applicable laws such as the "Electronic Commerce Act" and the Consumer Dispute Resolution Standards.

Article 16 (Inquiries)
For inquiries regarding the Service, please contact us via "Send Feedback" in the app or by email (chasoft.official@gmail.com).

Addendum
These Terms take effect on June 8, 2026.
settings.privacyBody:
Last updated: 2026.06.08

Quokka Recipe (hereinafter "this App") treats your personal information with care and complies with applicable laws, including the Personal Information Protection Act. This policy explains the types of information this App collects, uses, and provides, and how it is processed.

1. Information We Collect

1.1 Information you directly enter or provide
· Ingredient photos (taken with the camera or selected from the photo library)
· Receipt photos (when used)
· Ingredient names you enter directly
· Dietary preferences (allergies, spice preference, cooking time, diet type, cooking skill, preferred cuisine style)
· Notes and questions about recipes

1.2 Information collected automatically
· App usage statistics (number of ingredient scans)
· Saved recipe information (when you save with the ♥ button)

1.3 Information we do not collect
· Personally identifying information such as name, email, or phone number
· Location information
· Information from other apps on your device, such as contacts or call logs
· Advertising identifiers (IDFA/AAID)

2. Where Information Is Stored

This App does not require separate sign-up and stores information as follows.

2.1 Stored on your device (not permanently stored on external servers)
· Dietary preferences
· Saved recipes, folders, notes
· Quokka Q&A history
· Fridge ingredient list
· App usage statistics

The above information is stored only in your device's secure storage (iOS Keychain, Android KeyStore) and is not permanently stored on the Company's (Chasoft) servers.

2.2 Information transmitted to external services
To provide certain features, the following information is transmitted to external services. See Section 3 for details.

3. Provision of Information to External Services

This App uses the following external services to provide core features.

3.1 Anthropic Claude API
· Information transmitted: captured ingredient/receipt images, entered ingredient text, dietary preferences, recipe information, questions you enter
· Purpose of use: recognizing ingredients from images, generating recipes, answering recipe-related Q&A, analyzing captions/descriptions of YouTube videos
· Method of transmission: transmitted to Anthropic via a server (Supabase) operated by the Company (Chasoft); the Company does not separately store such content on its servers.
· Recipient: Anthropic, PBC (USA)
· Privacy policy: https://www.anthropic.com/legal/privacy

3.2 Google YouTube Data API
· Information transmitted: search queries based on ingredient names
· Purpose of use: recipe video search
· Recipient: Google LLC (USA)
· Privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

3.3 Coupang Partners
· Information transmitted: ingredient names (only when you click the "Buy on Coupang" link)
· Purpose of use: linking to the ingredient purchase page
· Recipient: Coupang Corp.
· Privacy policy: https://www.coupang.com/np/privacy

This App does not provide your information to any third party other than the services above.

4. Use of Permissions

This App uses the following permissions and does not use them for other purposes without your explicit consent.
· Camera: photographing ingredients and receipts — optional (you can use the gallery if denied)
· Photo library: selecting ingredient photos from the gallery — optional (you can use the camera if denied)

You can change permissions at any time in your device settings.

5. Retention and Destruction of Information

5.1 Information stored on your device
· Retention period: until you delete the app or use the "Reset Data" feature in the app
· Destruction method: deleted immediately upon app deletion or reset

5.2 Information transmitted to external services
Governed by each external service's privacy policy. (See the Anthropic, Google, and Coupang policies.)

6. Your Rights

You may exercise the following rights in this App.
· Access: view stored information in the in-app "Fridge," "Saved Recipes," and "My" menus
· Correction: edit directly in the corresponding in-app menu
· Deletion: delete individual data or delete everything at once via the in-app "Reset Data"
· App removal: deleting the app from your device deletes all locally stored data along with it.

7. Information of Children Under 14

This App does not intentionally collect personal information of children under the age of 14. If a child under 14 uses this App, they must do so with the consent of a legal representative.

8. Information Security

This App takes the following measures to protect user information.
· Data on the device is stored in the secure storage provided by the operating system (iOS Keychain, Android KeyStore)
· Communication with external services uses HTTPS encryption
· The Company (Chasoft) does not separately retain on its servers the user's ingredient images and entered information that pass through it to provide AI features

9. Changes

This policy may be revised in accordance with laws or changes to the Service. Changes will be announced through this page, and significant changes will be communicated via in-app notifications. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this document.

10. Contact

For inquiries about this policy or personal information processing, please contact us below.
· Business name: Chasoft
· Email: chasoft.official@gmail.com

This App is a solo-developer app with no separate data protection officer; we will respond promptly to inquiries sent to the contact above.
